name: 25 Moringa And Honeybush Tea Bags
description: Sip your way to wellness with Moringa & Honeybush Tea, a smooth, caffeine-free blend that nourishes and restores. Moringa offers a rich source of essential nutrients and antioxidants, while Honeybush a naturally sweet South African herb, adds calming, anti-inflammatory properties and a pleasant, honey-like flavor. Boosts immunity and supports overall wellness, vital nutrients, promotes healthy digestion and metabolism. Perfect for any time of day, this tea blend is a gentle, grounding addition to your self-care routine. Pure plant power in every cup. No additives. No artificial flavors. Just natural goodness.

name: 26 Moringa And Rooibos Tea Bags
description: Experience the perfect harmony of health and flavor with Moringa & Rooibos, a naturally caffeine-free blend designed to nourish your body and calm your mind. This powerful combination brings together the nutrient-rich leaves of Moringa with the antioxidant-packed Rooibos, offering a soothing yet revitalizing infusion. Boosts energy and metabolism naturally, promotes healthy digestion and detoxification, helps reduce inflammation. Naturally caffeine-free and gentle on the stomach.

name: 27 Moringa And Lemongrass Tea Bags
description: Refresh your body and mind with Moringa & Lemongrass Tea . A vibrant, caffeine-free blend designed to energize and restore. Moringa is packed with essential nutrients and antioxidants, while lemongrass adds a citrusy lift that supports digestion, detox, and relaxation. Boosts energy, supports immune health, promotes relaxation and mental clarity. Crisp, citrusy flavor with a smooth finish

name: 28 Moringa And Cinnamon Tea Bags
description: Discover the perfect blend of wellness and warmth with Moringa & Cinnamon. A nourishing combination that supports your body from the inside out. Moringa, known as the “miracle tree,” is packed with vitamins, minerals, while cinnamon brings its time-honored benefits for blood sugar balance and digestive health. Supports healthy metabolism and energy, promotes balanced blood sugar levels, boosts immunity with powerful antioxidants, aids digestion and reduces inflammation. Sip it morning or evening. This smooth, aromatic tea is your daily ritual for balance, warmth, and nourishment. All-natural. No additives. Just pure herbal goodness.

name: 29 Moringa And Ginger Tea Bags
description: Awaken your senses and support your well-being with Moringa & Ginger Tea. A bold, invigorating blend of two powerful botanicals. Moringa provides essential vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, while ginger brings natural warmth, aiding digestion and circulation. Together, they create a revitalizing tea that supports energy, detoxification, and daily balance. Boosts energy and immunity naturally, supports digestion, gut health, helps reduce inflammation, oxidative stress, promotes detox and circulation. Caffeine-free and refreshing with a spicy kick. Perfect for starting your day or resetting after meals, this tea delivers clean, plant-powered wellness in every sip. Simple. Pure. Powerful.

name: 50g Shilajit Powder
description:
Tap into centuries of Ayurvedic wisdom with our premium Shilajit powder. Rich in fulvic acid, trace minerals, and powerful antioxidants, Shilajit is known for revitalizing energy levels, enhancing stamina, and supporting mental clarity.

Ideal for daily use, this ancient adaptogen helps your body combat stress, balance hormones, and improve overall vitality. Just a small dose can deliver big benefits for both body and mind.

name: 25 Cancer Bush Tea Bags
description: Embrace the natural power of one of South Africa’s most revered medicinal plants. With its slightly bitter, earthy flavor and adaptogenic properties, this powerful botanical is a natural choice for anyone looking to strengthen their body’s defenses and restore inner balance.
